Metadata.title: Dots Arcade
Metadata.description: A small collection of browser mini-games

HomePage.title: Mini games
HomePage.subtitle: Choose a game — more coming soon

GamePage.comingSoon: This game is not ready yet. Check back later.

DotsGame.turnDrawing: Complete the enclosure: click adjacent dots of your color and return to the start
DotsGame.rulesShort: LMB: place a dot. RMB: place and start an enclosure — click neighboring dots of your color in a loop, finishing on the starting dot. Valid loops that surround opponent dots score and block those points. Esc or Undo: cancel drawing or remove the last dot. Clear: new game. Surrender ends the match.

dots.name: Dots
dots.description: Surround opponent dots with your polygons to score

snake.name: Snake
snake.description: Grow the snake without hitting the walls
